scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run watch:tokens & vite" "npm run serve"
scripts.build: npm run tokens && tsc && vite build
scripts.serve: npm run build:server && npm run start
scripts.predev: node -e "import fs from 'fs'; import {execSync} from 'child_process'; const p='../../packages/brand/sync.mjs'; if (fs.existsSync(p)) execSync('node '+p,{stdio:'inherit'});"
scripts.prebuild: node -e "import fs from 'fs'; import {execSync} from 'child_process'; const p='../../packages/brand/sync.mjs'; if (fs.existsSync(p)) execSync('node '+p,{stdio:'inherit'});"
scripts.prevercel-build: node -e "import fs from 'fs'; import {execSync} from 'child_process'; const p='../../packages/brand/sync.mjs'; if (fs.existsSync(p)) execSync('node '+p,{stdio:'inherit'});"
